entryRequirements.visaNote: Schengen area — most Western nationalities visa-free for up to 90 days within a 180-day period for tourism/business.
entryRequirements.officialSource: France-Visas / French Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs

transportInfo.paymentCard: Navigo Easy card (rechargeable, works on Metro/bus/RER within zones)
transportInfo.note: Pickpocketing is a real and persistent issue on the Metro and around major tourist sites (especially Gare du Nord) — keep bags zipped and in front.

majorEventsNote: Bastille Day (Jul 14) brings citywide fireworks and a major military parade on the Champs-Élysées — huge crowds, plan transport around road closures.
